meta.title: How Well Do We Concentrate_
meta.sourceDoc: 40. P2 - How Well Do We Concentrate_  多任务处理.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: How Well Do We Concentrate_  多任务处理

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 14
答案：B
PDF 定位："In the old days, a traditional wall phone would ring,and the housewife would have to stop her activities to answer it. When it rang, the sweeping or answering the door."
PDF 解析：描述了过去家中接电话时可以把其它家务完全停下，不需要多任务处理。

题目 15
答案：E
PDF 定位："With cellphones and computers atour sides at all times,peoplewill never run out of distractions."
PDF 解析：将随身电子设备视为人们总在多任务的原因。

题目 16
答案：F
PDF 定位：*.. group meetingswould be more efficient if we banned cellphones, acommon distraction."
PDF 解析：给出在职场中"禁用手机"这一可行做法。

题目 17
答案：C
PDF 定位："He found that for humans, the prefrontal cortex constitutes one-third of the brain, .. This allows a person to be more flexible and accurate in multitasking."
PDF 解析：将多任务能力与前额叶皮层大小联系起来。

题目 18
答案：D
PDF 定位：*.. overall the task took more time than if the person had focused on a single task."
PDF 解析：说明同时做两件事耗时更长。

答案：C

题目 18

questionSections.text:
题目 19
答案：B
PDF 定位："... the brain neurons lit up in singular areas one at a time neversimultaneously."
PDF 解析：发现视觉刺激下大脑一次只能专注于一个目标。

题目 20
答案：D
PDF 定位："Doing different jobs at the same time may actually save time. However, .. it does not mean they are more efficient."
PDF 解析：指出速度快+效果好。

题目 21
答案：A
PDF 定位：*.. believes people never reallydomultiple things simultaneously."
PDF 解析：强调所谓多任务只是表象。

题目 22
答案：D
PDF 定位："Withcellphones and computersatoursides atall times,people will never run out of distractions."
PDF 解析：认为多任务的根源在外部环境（科技与干扰）。

题目 23
答案：E
PDF 定位："The changes made to the workplace do not have to be dramatic."
PDF 解析：强调细小调整即可提升工作效率。

questionSections.text:
题目 24
答案：email voice
PDF 定位："Lehman called this phenomenon'email voice.""
PDF 解析：术语"emailvoice"描述读信息而忽视周 围的情形。

题目 25
答案：prefrontal cortex
PDF 定位："... studied the prefrontal cortex, which guides the brain while a person is multitasking."
PDF 解析：指明控制多任务的大脑部位。

题目 26
答案：group meetings
PDF 定位：*.. common workplace situations-such as group meetings-would be more efficient if we banned cellphones..."
PDF 解析：建议在会议中禁用手机以解决多任务问题。
